heading: Short title
label: 715 Short title
text: This subchapter shall be known by the short title of “Migratory Bird Conservation Act.”
notes: Short Title of 1976 Amendment, Feb 17, 1976, , provided:Pub. L. 94–215, § 190 Stat. 189“That this Act [amending sections 668dd, 715a, 715k–3, 715k–5, 718a, 718b, and 718d of this title] may be cited as the ‘Wetlands Loan Extension Act of 1976’.”
amendments: Short Title of 1976 Amendment, Feb 17, 1976, , provided:Pub. L. 94–215, § 190 Stat. 189“That this Act [amending sections 668dd, 715a, 715k–3, 715k–5, 718a, 718b, and 718d of this title] may be cited as the ‘Wetlands Loan Extension Act of 1976’.”
